name: Underbed Fabric Shoe Storage Gray - Brightroom™: Polyester Organizer with Dividers, 12-Pair Capacity, Spot Clean
description:
Keep your footwear collection organized but out of sight with the Underbed Fabric Shoe Storage from Brightroom™. This gray shoe storage organizer features multiple divided compartments to help keep each pair separate. Made with a soft and lightweight fabric, this underbed shoe storage easily slips under bed, and comes with a transparent cover to help protect them from dirt.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
